title: KickRedirect
description: Redirect your players to a server after a server shutdown
body:
# KickRedirect
[![WorkFlow](https://img.shields.io/github/actions/workflow/status/4drian3d/KickRedirect/build.yml?style=flat-square)](https://github.com/4drian3d/KickRedirect/actions)
![Latest Version](https://img.shields.io/github/v/release/4drian3d/KickRedirect?style=flat-square)
[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/899740810956910683?color=7289da&logo=Discord&label=Discord&style=flat-square)](https://discord.gg/5NMMzK5mAn)
![Modrinth Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/ZzGxcsOG?logo=Modrinth&style=flat-square)
![GitHub Downloads](https://img.shields.io/github/downloads/4drian3d/KickRedirect/total?logo=GitHub&style=flat-square)

Redirect your players to a server after a server shutdown

[![](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/6fa909d5-ad2b-42c2-a7ec-1c51f8b6384f.webp)](https://www.bisecthosting.com/4drian3d?r=ModKickRedirect)

## Requirements

- Velocity 3.1.2|3.2.0+
- Java 11+


## Commands

`/kickredirect reload`

Reload the configuration



### How does this plugin differ from the Velocity builtin redirect system?

KickRedirect offers a more advanced redirection system, with multiple redirection systems, full configuration of the servers to which players will be redirected, and more.
